title: Fourier Analysis, Signals, and Time Series · Mastery Check
summary: Build, test, and communicate a model involving signals and temporal demand. Every item uses a fresh case and misconception-specific distractors. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for a reproducible signals fourier computational study. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Formulate fourier series in a dimensioned applied model and defend the method's assumptions.
Derive fourier transform in a dimensioned applied model and defend the method's assumptions.
Compute sampling aliasing in a dimensioned applied model and defend the method's assumptions.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""applied-mathematics-advanced cumulative model portfolio."""

from math import exp, log, sqrt


def reasonableness(value: float, lower: float, upper: float) -> bool:
    return lower <= value <= upper

steps.title: Calculate the unfamiliar quantity
steps.instruction: Perpendicular components are 12 units and 16 units. Calculate the resultant magnitude.
steps.why: A numerical result is not complete until its unit, assumptions, scale, and tolerance survive a reasonableness check.

content.text: Use √(12² + 16²) and check that the result exceeds either component.

content.title: Before calculating
content.text: Predict the sign and approximate magnitude. Enter the requested quantity with a unit, then compare it with that prediction.

hints: Use √(12² + 16²) and check that the result exceeds either component.
Keep full working precision and round only the final reported value.
The accepted result is within 0.001 of the exact value and includes units.

steps.title: Defend one difficult decision
steps.instruction: Write a concise evidence note that explains when Time Series Forecast applies, what can fail, and how the changed case was verified.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Communicate time series forecast in a dimensioned applied model and defend the method's assumptions.
